ogTitle: Kearneys Spring vs Kedron: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kearneys Spring and Kedron.
heading: Kearneys Spring vs Kedron — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kearneys Spring, Queensland and Kedron, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kedron has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Kearneys Spring (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kearneys Spring or Kedron safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kearneys Spring has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Kedron scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kearneys Spring scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Kedron scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kearneys Spring or Kedron?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kedron has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
